title: Unique URL's for Kanban View
excerpt:
Currently a ticket in the Kanban view doesn’t create a unique URL. Which means that when you copy the URL to send a ticket to a colleague or to link to another board, it doesnt send you to the ticket, just the board. 
If…

posts.author: Halo-Josh (Joshua Rodwell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently a ticket in the Kanban view doesn’t create a unique URL. Which means that when you copy the URL to send a ticket to a colleague or to link to another board, it doesnt send you to the ticket, just the board.

If i copy the project ticket, it then sends me directly to the main table ticket, which is in a list ticket format.

Please can we look at when you view a project ticket in the Kanban view, it creates a unique URL so you can copy to that specific view.
